session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in the directory `/home/runner/work/erk/erk` and report the full output including any test failures or errors. This is a read-only task - do not modify any files. Focus on whether all checks pass or fail, and list any failures in detail.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to check all tests and linting

session.assistant:
**make fast-ci passed: All checks successful**
All components of the fast-ci target passed cleanly:
**Linting & Code Quality:** - Lint: All checks passed - Format check: 1739 files already formatted - Prettier: All matched files use correct code style - Markdown check: Passed - Exec reference check: Reference.md up to date - Type checking (ty): All checks passed
**Tests:** - Unit tests (erk): 5921 passed in 12.86s - Tests (erk-dev): 138 passed in 5.01s - Tests (erk-statusline): 123 passed in 0.75s - Tests (erk-mcp): 50 passed
**Documentation Validation:** - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - CLAUDE.md files properly paired: 19 files checked with 0 violations
**Summary:** All checks passed with no failures or errors.
